## Checklist

- [ ] README is in English
- [ ] Naming follows `kebab-case` (channels and integration types)
- [ ] Prerequisites are clearly listed
- [ ] Steps are numbered and reproducible
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Main [README.md](../README.md) table updated (if adding new sample)
- [ ] Channel README updated (if adding new integration to existing channel)
